column3: Searched for healthy chicken and rice alternatives in Cairo - found options like Cairo Kitchen with grilled chicken and brown rice, Lyfe Maadi with healthy bowls, and other health-conscious eateries
Traditional chicken and rice meal - can be made healthier with brown rice and grilled chicken
Traditional meat and spaghetti meal with ground beef or chicken served with pasta, typically high in protein and refined carbohydrates
A typical serving of meat and spaghetti can be high in calories and saturated fats, depending on the type of meat and sauce used.

column1: healthy breakfast with eggs, fruits, and whole grain bread
column3: This meal is composed of eggs, fruits, vegetables, and whole grain bread, providing a balanced intake of protein, vitamins, and fiber. It's a great way to start the day with sustained energy.
